app.title: Add it in the Claude app
steps: Open Customize, then Plugins.
In Personal plugins, select +, then Add marketplace.
Choose Add from a repository, paste https://github.com/mrchaarlie/agent-consent-patterns, then add the marketplace.
Select agent-consent-patterns from the marketplace, then select Install.
Run this in the project directory. It adds the marketplace when needed, otherwise refreshes it before installing the skill for this project.
project.code: (claude plugin marketplace add mrchaarlie/agent-consent-patterns --scope project || claude plugin marketplace update agent-consent-patterns) && claude plugin install agent-consent-patterns@agent-consent-patterns --scope project

steps: Run this in a terminal. It adds the marketplace when needed, otherwise refreshes it before installing the skill for your user account.
global.code: (claude plugin marketplace add mrchaarlie/agent-consent-patterns --scope user || claude plugin marketplace update agent-consent-patterns) && claude plugin install agent-consent-patterns@agent-consent-patterns --scope user

app.title: Add it in the ChatGPT-Codex app
steps: In a ChatGPT-Codex task, send this message.
app.code: Add the Agent Consent Patterns plugin from https://github.com/mrchaarlie/agent-consent-patterns

cli.title: Install with Codex CLI
steps: Run this in a terminal. It adds the marketplace when needed, otherwise refreshes it before installing the plugin.
cli.code: (codex plugin marketplace add mrchaarlie/agent-consent-patterns || codex plugin marketplace upgrade agent-consent-patterns) && codex plugin add agent-consent-patterns@agent-consent-patterns

steps: Download the portable skill into this workspace's Gemini skills directory, then run /skills reload or start a new session.
Download the portable skill into your personal Gemini skills directory, then run /skills reload or start a new session.

cli.title: Add the guidance as a Cursor rule

steps: Run this in the workspace. It creates an Agent Requested rule that Cursor can load when consent UX is relevant.
project.code: mkdir -p .cursor/rules && { printf '%s\n' '---' 'description: Design and review consent, permission, approval, and human-in-the-loop UX.' 'alwaysApply: false' '---' && curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrchaarlie/agent-consent-patterns/main/plugins/agent-consent-patterns/skills/agent-consent-patterns/SKILL.md | awk 'BEGIN { delimiters = 0 } { if (delimiters < 2 && /^---$/) { delimiters++; next } if (delimiters >= 2) print }'; } > .cursor/rules/agent-consent-patterns.mdc

steps: Open Cursor Settings, then Rules. Copy the portable skill source into User Rules to apply it to every Cursor project.

cli.title: Add the skill to Qwen Code

steps: Download the portable skill into this project's Qwen skills directory, then start a new session.
Download the portable skill into your personal Qwen skills directory, then start a new session.

cli.title: Add the skill to Deep Code

steps: Download the portable skill into this third-party DeepSeek integration's project skills directory, then start a new session.
Download the portable skill into your personal Deep Code skills directory, then start a new session.

cli.title: Add the skill to Grok Build

steps: Download the portable skill into this project's Grok skills directory, then start a new Grok session.
Download the portable skill into your personal Grok skills directory, then start a new Grok session.

cli.title: Add the skill to GitHub Copilot

steps: Download the portable skill into this repository's Copilot skills directory, then start a new Copilot session or run /skills reload.
Download the portable skill into your personal Copilot skills directory, then start a new Copilot session or run /skills reload.

cli.title: Add the guidance as a Windsurf rule
steps: Run this in the workspace. Windsurf's 6,000-character global-rule limit is too small for this 8,539-character guide, so use the workspace rule instead.
cli.code: mkdir -p .windsurf/rules && { printf '%s\n' '---' 'trigger: model_decision' 'description: Design and review consent, permission, approval, and human-in-the-loop UX.' '---' && curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/mrchaarlie/agent-consent-patterns/main/plugins/agent-consent-patterns/skills/agent-consent-patterns/SKILL.md | awk 'BEGIN { delimiters = 0 } { if (delimiters < 2 && /^---$/) { delimiters++; next } if (delimiters >= 2) print }'; } > .windsurf/rules/agent-consent-patterns.md

cli.title: Add the portable skill
steps: Download or copy this portable SKILL.md into your agent's documented skills location.
